zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭爾金斯利時，她的父親Richard De Kingsley101歲，母親Joan de Stourton82歲。她於大約1249年與William Gerard I在英國英格蘭爾金斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1317年之後在英國爾金斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley于大约1235年出生在英国英格兰爾金斯利时，她的父亲Richard De Kingsley101岁，母亲Joan de Stourton82岁。她于大约1249年与William Gerard I在英国英格兰爾金斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1317年之后在英国爾金斯利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kingsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Kingsley, in Cheshire, Hampshire, and Staffordshire. The placenames derive from Old English cing ‘king’ (genitive cinges) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley was born about 1235, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard De Kingsley, was 101 and her mother, Joan de Stourton, was 82. She married William Gerard I about 1249, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1317, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley est née environ 1235, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Kingsley, avait 101 ans et sa mère, Joan de Stourton, avait 82 ans. Elle a épousé William Gerard I environ 1249, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1317, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley um 1235 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Kingsley 101 und ihre Mutter Joan de Stourton 82. Sie hat um 1249 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William Gerard I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1317 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley è nata il circa 1235 nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard De Kingsley, aveva 101 anni e sua madre, Joan de Stourton, aveva 82 anni. Lei sposato William Gerard I circa 1249, nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1317, nel Kingsley, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsleyが約1235年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで生まれた時，父Richard De Kingsleyは101歳，母Joan de Stourtonは82歳であった。約1249年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーでWilliam Gerard Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1317年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Kingsley(은)는 101세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Stourton(은)는 82세였다. 그녀는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 William Gerard I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 이후 영국 체실르 킨그슬리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard De Kingsley, tinha 101 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Stourton, tinha 82 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gerard I aproximadamente 1249, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1317, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma De Kingsley Heiress Of Kingsley родилась около 1235 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard De Kingsley было 101 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Stourton, 82. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gerard I около 1249 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1317 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con William Gerard I aproximadamente 1249, en Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1317, en Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
